raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declaring a completed internal shift toward reliance on external/spiritual resources as a foundation for behavioral change",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "A Power greater than oneself exists",
    "This Power possesses the capacity to restore sanity",
    "The speaker has undergone a genuine change in belief",
    "Restoration of sanity is both desirable and achievable through this means"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent within a framework that accepts non-empirical sources of agency; logically coherent only if the existence and efficacy of the Power are granted as premises",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The individual experiences the belief as motivating sustained action, reduced self-willfulness, and improved recovery-relevant behaviors without requiring verifiable external validation",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The belief substitutes for evidence-based methods, fosters passivity, or attributes outcomes to an unverifiable entity when personal agency or clinical intervention is the operative factor"
}
